name: river_lines_streams_drains
description: Mumbai linear drainage network — rivers, streams, and drains as lines exported from QGIS.
notes: Apply different buffer sizes based on the ftype column — rivers get 300m, streams and drains get 150m. This file contains linear features only, not polygons. Project to a metric CRS (e.g. EPSG:32643) before buffering.
example_code:
import geopandas as gpd
from shapely.validation import make_valid
drains = gpd.read_file('/data/geojson_files/river_lines_streams_drains.geojson')
drains['geometry'] = drains['geometry'].apply(make_valid)
print(drains[['ftype', 'geometry']].head())
